description: Google Cloud Vision API provides pretrained image-analysis features such as labeling, OCR, face and landmark detection, and related annotation services. It is part of Google Cloud's Vision AI offerings for integrating computer vision into applications.
summary: vision.googleapis.com exposes one authenticated HTTP REST surface: the Google Cloud Vision API at `https://vision.googleapis.com/v1`, which accepts either a Google Cloud API key or a Google OAuth 2.0 bearer token.
